column1: Have you heard of "Big Ben?" It's one of the most____________landmarks in Britain. (FAME)
When you think of Big Ben , what do you think of? You probably think of a clock tower on the end of a big____________in the centre of London. (BUILD)
But Big Ben is_____________not a tower - it's the bell inside the tower. It's named after Sir Benjamin Hall, whose name is written on the bell. (ACTUAL)
The first bell cracked and broke, so the current bell is in fact a______________. It was first rung in 1859. (REPLACE)
Until 2012, the tower was officially called the Clock Tower. Then it was renamed in____________of Queen Elizabeth's 60 years as queen. (CELEBRATE)
Now it is called  Elizabeth Tower. And the____________bell behind the clock has an official name too. It's not Big Ben - that's just a nickname. It's called the Great Bell. (NOISE)
Toby was enjoying being a student at university. However, he had_____________no idea what job he wanted to do. (ABSOLUTE)
He knew that he would have to make a_______________very soon. (DECIDE)
He started thinking about all the different______________but he didn't like any of them. (POSSIBLE)
